backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Disease and Medicine types, storing a map of diseases, and exposing initialize, getAllDiseases, and getDisease endpoints with two pre-seeded conditions (Diabetes and Hypertension).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing two PWA install-prompt features: early beforeinstallprompt capture in index.html and storing the deferred prompt on window.__installPrompt for the useInstallPrompt hook.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of short summaries for every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference index for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that registers an early inline script to capture beforeinstallprompt into window.__installPrompt and registers the service worker on load before the React bundle mounts.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA Web App Manifest for MediFind with standalone display, green theme color, and separate icon entries for 192×192 and 512×512 PNGs each split into 'any' and 'maskable' purposes.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker (cache version medifind-v2) that caches the root URL on install, cleans old caches on activate with proper promise chaining for skipWaiting/clients.claim, and falls back to cache on network failure for GET requests.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing navigation state between the DiseaseDirectory and PharmacyFinder pages, wrapped in the Layout shell with smooth scroll-to-top on page change.
frontend/src/components/DiseaseCard.tsx: Compact card component rendering a disease's icon, name, truncated description, and medicine count badge, with visual highlight when selected.
frontend/src/components/DiseaseDetail.ts: Detail panel component showing a disease's full description, numbered medicine list with dosage notes, and a medical disclaimer, with a close button.
frontend/src/components/InstallPrompt.ts: Renders a dismissible banner prompting users to install the MediFind PWA, with separate flows for iOS (manual share instructions) and other browsers (native install prompt).
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the main app shell with a sticky header, desktop and mobile navigation between 'Disease Directory' and 'Find Pharmacy' pages, an install prompt banner, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/PharmacyCard.tsx: Displays a single pharmacy's details (name, address, phone, hours, distance) in a card, with special styling for the nearest result.
frontend/src/data/pharmacies.ts: Defines the Pharmacy interface and exports a static list of 12 sample pharmacy entries with coordinates, addresses, phone numbers, and hours.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, returning an anonymous actor when unauthenticated and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGeolocation.ts: React hook that wraps the browser Geolocation API to request the user's current coordinates, exposing loading/error state and reset functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useInstallPrompt.ts: React hook that captures the browser's beforeinstallprompt event and detects iOS standalone mode to expose PWA install and dismiss functionality with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state with delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all diseases, a single disease, and initializing the disease database via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for a medical green light/dark theme including utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/DiseaseDirectory.tsx: Page component that displays a searchable list of diseases fetched from the backend, auto-initializes data if empty, and shows an expandable detail view for each disease.
frontend/src/pages/PharmacyFinder.tsx: Page component that uses the browser Geolocation API to obtain the user's coordinates and displays hardcoded sample pharmacies sorted by proximity using the Haversine formula.
frontend/src/utils/haversine.ts: Utility module implementing the Haversine formula to calculate the distance in kilometers between two geographic coordinates, plus a distance formatting helper.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, oklch-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes, with typography and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the app's features, architectural notes, known issues (PWA install prompt not working), and versioning for a health app with disease directory and pharmacy finder.
